pi_items.source: setup_task.sh writes market_news.xml and starts python3 -m http.server 8080 in that directory.
setup_task.sh generates the RSS XML with <title>Global Equities Rebound Strongly</title> as the first item.
export_result.sh verifies the account creation by searching for 'rss' in the Thunderbird preferences.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated RSS feed hosted locally at http://localhost:8080/market_news.xml. The feed contains the headline 'Global Equities Rebound Strongly', and the expected Thunderbird account type for this feed is 'rss'.
